text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to see and understand images and videos. Two important tasks in computer vision are image recognition and object detection. Image recognition identifies what is in a picture, such as a cat or a tree. Object detection goes further by finding and locating specific objects within an image. Computer vision has many applications in our daily lives. For example, it powers facial recognition on smartphones and helps doctors analyze medical scans. One exciting use is in self-driving cars, where it helps detect pedestrians, traffic signs, and other vehicles. This technology makes driving safer and more efficient.
